name: plausible
description: Simple, open-source, lightweight (< 1 KB) and privacy-friendly web analytics alternative to Google Analytics.

zh.description: plausible 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的自托管开源工具，适合团队协作、内部流程和日常生产力场景。

name: SigNoz
description: SigNoz is an open-source observability platform native to OpenTelemetry with logs, traces and metrics in a single application. An open-source alternative to DataDog, NewRelic, etc.

zh.description: SigNoz 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的自托管开源工具，适合团队协作、内部流程和日常生产力场景。

name: Supabase
description: Open source Firebase alternative with Postgres database, authentication, realtime, storage, and edge functions.

zh.description: Firebase 开源替代方案，支持 Postgres 数据库，认证，realtime，storage，与 edge functions。

name: Tolgee
description: An open-source localization platform that developers enjoy working with.

zh.description: Tolgee 是一个开源的本地化平台，专为开发者设计，支持上下文直接翻译、一键生成翻译截图、生产环境实时编辑，并集成多种机器翻译服务（如 DeepL、Google Translate），提供翻译记忆与自动化功能，简化多语言应用的开发流程。

name: Zot Registry
description: OCI-native container image registry with basic auth and optional S3-compatible object storage backend.

zh.description: Zot Registry 是一个 OCI 原生容器镜像仓库，默认启用基础认证，并支持在本地存储与 S3 兼容对象存储之间按需选择。

name: Cronicle
description: Cronicle is a multi-server task scheduler and runner, with a web based front-end UI.It handles both scheduled, repeating and on-demand jobs, targeting any number of slave servers, with real-time stats and live log viewer.Written in Node.js, proudly open source and MIT licensed.default username and password is admin

zh.description: Cronicle 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的 DevOps 工具，适合平台运维、发布流程和基础设施管理。

name: Directus
description: Open-source data platform and headless CMS for managing SQL databases with APIs, auth, files, and an admin app.

zh.description: Directus 是开源数据平台和 Headless CMS，可为 SQL 数据库提供 API、权限、文件管理和管理后台。

name: Formbricks
description: Formbricks provides a free and open source surveying platform. Gather feedback at every point in the user journey with beautiful in-app, website, link and email surveys.

zh.description: Formbricks 是一个免费的开源问卷调研平台，旨在帮助你轻松获取用户反馈，深入了解他们的体验。

name: Full Stack FastAPI
description: Production-ready FastAPI + PostgreSQL + Frontend stack

zh.description: 生产可用的 FastAPI + PostgreSQL + 前端全栈模板

name: Glance
description: A self-hosted dashboard that puts all your feeds in one place

zh.description: 一个自托管的仪表板，将您所有的订阅源集中在一个地方

name: influxdb
description: Real-time insights from any time series data with a single, purpose-built database. Run at any scale in any environment in the cloud, on-premises, or at the edge.

zh.description: influxdb 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的数据库服务，支持持久化存储并连接到云上应用。

name: jsoncrack
description: JSON Crack is a free, open-source data visualization app capable of visualizing data formats such as JSON, YAML, XML, CSV and more, into interactive graphs.

zh.description: jsoncrack 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的自托管开源工具，适合团队协作、内部流程和日常生产力场景。

name: Keycloak
description: Open Source Identity and Access Management solution for modern Applications and Services

zh.description: 面向现代应用和服务的开源身份和访问管理解决方案

name: Mage AI
description: An open-source data pipeline tool for building and running data workflows.

zh.description: 开源数据流水线工具，用于构建与运行数据工作流。

name: MinIO
description: MinIO is a High Performance Object Storage released under GNU Affero General Public License v3.0. It is API compatible with Amazon S3 cloud storage service. Use MinIO to build high performance infrastructure for machine learning, analytics and application data workloads.

zh.description: MinIO 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的存储服务，适合文件、对象数据和应用资产管理。

name: Nacos
description: Dynamic Naming and Configuration Service - an easy-to-use platform designed for dynamic service discovery and configuration and service management

zh.description: 动态命名和配置服务 - 一个易于使用的平台，专为动态服务发现、配置和服务管理而设计

name: NetBird
description: 基于 WireGuard 的零信任网络平台，支持自托管管理、信令与中继。

zh.description: 基于 WireGuard 的零信任网络平台，支持自托管管理、信令与中继。

name: Node-RED
description: Low-code programming for event-driven applications

zh.description: 面向事件驱动应用的低代码编程平台。

name: Notifuse
description: Open-source emailing platform for newsletters, transactional emails, automations, and real-time user segments

zh.description: 开源邮件平台，支持新闻邮件、事务邮件、自动化流程与实时用户分群。

name: Paperless-ngx
description: Paperless-ngx is a community-supported open-source document management system that transforms your physical documents into a searchable online archive so you can keep, well, less paper.

zh.description: Paperless-ngx 是一个社区支持的开源文档管理系统，可以将您的纸质文档转换为可搜索的在线档案，让您减少纸张使用。

name: phpmyadmin
description: A web interface for MySQL and MariaDB.

zh.description: phpmyadmin 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的自托管开源工具，适合团队协作、内部流程和日常生产力场景。

name: Refly
description: Refly is an open-source AI-native creation engine powered by 13+ leading AI models.

zh.description: refly 是一款开源的 AI Native 创作引擎，由多线程对话、代码组件、知识库集成、上下文记忆和智能搜索驱动，Refly 是将创意转化为优质内容的最佳方式。

name: WooCommerce
description: WooCommerce is an open-source ecommerce platform built on WordPress.

zh.description: WooCommerce 是基于 WordPress 的开源电商平台。

name: ZITADEL
description: Open-source identity and access management platform for authentication and authorization.

zh.description: 开源身份与访问管理平台，提供认证与授权能力。

name: Authentik
description: Authentik is an open-source identity provider focused on flexibility and versatility.

zh.description: Authentik 是一个开源身份认证平台，专注于灵活性与可扩展性。

name: Chatwoot
description: Open-source customer engagement platform with live chat, email, and social media integrations

zh.description: 开源客户互动平台，支持实时聊天、邮件和社交媒体集成

name: Drizzle Studio (Gateway)
description: Drizzle Studio (Gateway) is a self-hosted, browser-based interface for exploring and managing your database schema using the Drizzle ORM ecosystem. It acts as a gateway between your database and Drizzle Studio’s frontend, enabling secure connections, schema introspection, and query execution directly from your own infrastructure instead of relying on a public service.

zh.description: Drizzle Studio (Gateway) 是一款现代化的 TypeScript ORM，主打轻量与强类型体验。它兼容 PostgreSQL、MySQL、SQLite 等主流数据库，并对多种 Serverless/边缘数据库提供现成适配。

name: EMQX
description: The most scalable open-source MQTT broker for IoT, IIoT, and connected vehicles

zh.description: EMQX 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的自托管开源工具，适合团队协作、内部流程和日常生产力场景。

name: NocoDB
description: Turns any MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, SQLite & MariaDB into a smart spreadsheet.

zh.description: NocoDB 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的数据库服务，支持持久化存储并连接到云上应用。

name: OpenObserve
description: OpenObserve is a cloud native observability platform built specifically for logs, metrics, traces, analytics, RUM (Real User Monitoring - Performance, Errors, Session Replay) designed to work at petabyte scale.

zh.description: OpenObserve 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的自托管开源工具，适合团队协作、内部流程和日常生产力场景。

name: PostHog
description: Open-source product analytics platform with session replay, feature flags, and experimentation.

zh.description: 开源 product 分析平台，支持 session replay，feature flags，与 experimentation。

name: Presenton
description: Open-source AI presentation generator and API with self-hosted model, image, template, and export controls.

zh.description: 开源 AI 演示文稿生成器和 API，支持自托管模型、图像生成、模板与导出控制。

name: SurveyKing
description: SurveyKing is one of the known open source survey systems that has the most powerful functions, the simplest installation, and the best comprehensive experience.

zh.description: SurveyKing 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的自托管开源工具，适合团队协作、内部流程和日常生产力场景。

name: teable
description: Teable is a Super fast, Real-time, Professional, Developer friendly, No-code database built on Postgres.

zh.description: Teable 是一款企业级高性能多维表格解决方案，通过无代码方式快速构建业务管理系统，支持私有部署和精细权限管理。

name: tentix
description: A FastGPT-powered AI customer service platform with 10x accelerated resolution.

zh.description: tentix 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的 DevOps 工具，适合平台运维、发布流程和基础设施管理。

name: Umami
description: Umami is an open source, privacy-focused alternative to Google Analytics.

zh.description: Umami 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的监控与可观测性工具，帮助团队查看指标、日志和运行状态。

name: Coze Studio
description: An open-source AI agent development platform with integrated workflow, knowledge, memory, plugin, and chat capabilities.

zh.description: 开源的一站式 AI Agent 开发平台，集成工作流、知识库、记忆、插件与聊天能力。

name: FastGPT
description: FastGPT is an open-source AI knowledge base and workflow platform with RAG retrieval, model orchestration, MCP access, and plugin extensibility.

zh.description: FastGPT 是一款开源 AI 知识库与工作流平台，提供 RAG 检索、模型编排、MCP 接入和插件扩展能力。

name: Hasura
description: Hasura GraphQL Engine with PostgreSQL metadata storage and Data Connector Agent.

zh.description: hasura graphql engine 支持 postgresql metadata storage 与 data connector agent。

name: Loki
description: Loki is a horizontally scalable, highly available, multi-tenant log aggregation system inspired by Prometheus.

zh.description: Loki 是一个水平可扩展、高可用、多租户的日志聚合系统，灵感来自 Prometheus。

name: MLflow
description: MLflow is an open-source developer platform to build AI/LLM applications and models with confidence.

zh.description: 开源机器学习生命周期平台 - 跟踪实验、打包代码为可重现运行、共享和部署模型

name: pgadmin4
description: pgAdmin 4 is a rewrite of the popular pgAdmin3 management tool for the PostgreSQL database.

zh.description: pgadmin4 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的数据库服务，支持持久化存储并连接到云上应用。

name: PrivateBin
description: A minimalist, open source online pastebin where the server has zero knowledge of pasted data.

zh.description: PrivateBin 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的自托管开源工具，适合团队协作、内部流程和日常生产力场景。

name: RedisInsight
description: RedisInsight is a visual tool that provides capabilities to design, develop and optimize your Redis application. Query, analyse and interact with your Redis data.

zh.description: RedisInsight 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的数据库服务，支持持久化存储并连接到云上应用。

name: registry
description: registry is an implementation of the OCI Distribution Specification. gui-registry is a web UI for registry.

zh.description: registry 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的自托管开源工具，适合团队协作、内部流程和日常生产力场景。

name: Ruiqi-Waf
description: A modern web application firewall (WAF) management system built on top of HAProxy and OWASP Coraza WAF with the Coraza SPOA integration. This system provides a comprehensive backend API for managing HAProxy configurations, Coraza WAF rules, and traffic inspection.

zh.description: Ruiqi-Waf 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的 DevOps 工具，适合平台运维、发布流程和基础设施管理。

name: RustFS
description: RustFS is a high-performance, S3-compatible object storage system built with Rust, offering distributed storage capabilities with multiple volume support.

zh.description: RustFS 是一个使用 Rust 构建的高性能 S3 兼容对象存储系统，提供分布式存储能力，支持多卷存储。

name: Budibase
description: Budibase is an open-source low-code platform that helps you build and deploy modern business apps in minutes

zh.description: Budibase 是一个开源的低代码平台，帮助您在几分钟内构建和部署现代化的业务应用

name: Cap
description: Open source alternative to Loom. Record, edit and share videos in seconds.

zh.description: Loom 的开源替代品。快速录制、编辑和分享视频。

name: Casdoor
description: Casdoor is a UI-first Identity Access Management (IAM) / Single-Sign-On (SSO) platform based on OAuth 2.0, OIDC, SAML and CAS.

zh.description: Casdoor 是一个基于 OAuth 2.0、OIDC、SAML 和 CAS 的 UI 优先的身份访问管理（IAM）/单点登录（SSO）平台。

name: Harbor
description: Harbor is an open-source OCI artifact registry that secures software supply chains with vulnerability scanning, signing, and access control.

zh.description: Harbor 是一个开源 OCI 制品仓库，提供漏洞扫描、签名与访问控制能力，用于保障软件供应链安全。

name: Kanboard
description: Open source Kanban project management software

zh.description: 开源看板项目管理软件。

name: Keystone
description: Keystone is an open-source headless CMS and application framework for building GraphQL-powered backends and Admin UIs.

zh.description: Keystone 是一个开源无头 CMS 与应用框架，用于构建基于 GraphQL 的后端和 Admin UI。

name: PalaCMS
description: PalaCMS is a modern content management system built for developers and content creators

zh.description: PalaCMS 是一个为开发者和内容创作者构建的现代内容管理系统

name: Pocket ID
description: Pocket ID is a simple OIDC provider that authenticates users with passkeys.

zh.description: Pocket ID 是一个简洁的 OIDC 提供商，支持使用 Passkey 进行身份认证。

name: Project Quay
description: Container registry for building, storing, and distributing container images.

zh.description: 用于构建、存储和分发容器镜像的企业级容器镜像仓库。

name: qinglong
description: Timed task management platform supporting Python3, JavaScript, Shell, Typescript

zh.description: qinglong 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的自托管开源工具，适合团队协作、内部流程和日常生产力场景。

name: Reactive-Resume
description: A free and open-source resume builder that simplifies the process of creating, updating, and sharing your resume.

zh.description: Reactive-Resume 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的自托管开源工具，适合团队协作、内部流程和日常生产力场景。

name: Readeck
description: Readeck helps you keep all that web content you’ll want to revisit in an hour, tomorrow, or in 20 years.

zh.description: Readeck 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的自托管开源工具，适合团队协作、内部流程和日常生产力场景。

name: Strapi
description: Strapi is the leading open-source headless CMS. 100% JavaScript/TypeScript and fully customizable.

zh.description: Strapi 是领先的开源无头 CMS。100% JavaScript/TypeScript，完全可定制。

name: TYPO3
description: Open-source enterprise content management system for building and managing websites.

zh.description: 开源企业级内容管理系统，用于构建和管理网站。

name: WrenAI
description: 🤖 Open-source GenBI AI Agent that empowers data-driven teams to chat with their data to generate Text-to-SQL, charts, spreadsheets, reports, and BI. 📈📊📋🧑‍💻

zh.description: WrenAI 是可在 Sealos 上一键部署的低代码平台，适合快速构建内部工具和业务应用。
